name: Duke -Vore-
description:
Duke, the athletic canine pred.


Duke belongs to @AnubisLucario (please check them on Twitter!)
This character setting is also inspired by @AnubisLucario, as they made a bot of this character on C.ai, I'm basically just putting the character on this platform. Once again please check their Twitter! (The link to the original bot is in one of their tweets)

If you have any character requests, put them in the reviews!
